EN | ES

Welcome to Hotel Yuli, your tropical sanctuary nestled between the emerald mountains and sapphire ocean of Uvita, Costa Rica. Our attentive team is here to ensure your stay is perfectly comfortable and filled with immersive, essential Costa Rican experiences.

Hotel Guidelines
Guest Essentials
Your Stay, Our Promise

A few things to help you feel at home.

Recycling
Bins next to common kitchen. Help us protect the environment. Please rinse off everything before placing it in the bins.
Common Kitchen
A shared, fully equipped kitchen where guests can prepare their own meals, perfect for light cooking and simple dishes, with a hot & cold water dispenser available.
No Smoking
Smoke-free property. A $250 USD cleaning fee applies for violations.
Toilet System
Flush only natural waste. Use waste bins for toilet paper — this protects our pipes and environment.
Hot Water
Solar-powered — takes a few minutes to warm up. Higher pressure = colder. Lower pressure = hotter.
Pool
Open until 10:00 PM. No glass allowed. Colored towels = pool use. White towels = room only.
Restaurant
Open 7:00 AM–9:00 PM. Breakfast 7–9 AM ($11 USD/person). Guests receive 10% discount on food with room key.
Beach
5 min walk. $6 USD entry to Marino Ballena National Park. Ask lifeguards about safe swimming areas.
Eco Responsibility
Please enjoy water and electricity responsibly. Keep the AC on only with windows closed, and remember to turn it off when you leave. Together, we protect this paradise.
Experiences
Curated Moments
The Soul of Uvita

Book through reception · WhatsApp +506 8973 4133 · Enjoy this service at no additional cost — our team is happy to assist you with bookings. Any official park or activity fees are paid directly to the provider.

🐋 Whale Watching
$75 / person
3–4 hours · Humpback whales, dolphins, turtles & seabirds. Bilingual guide. Includes water, fruit & national park fee.
View Details →
🤿 Isla del Caño Snorkeling
Adults $145 · Kids $95
~3 hours · 2nd best snorkeling in Costa Rica. Fish, rays, turtles & sharks. Departs 6:30 AM. Gear & lunch included.
View Details →
🌳 Corcovado Hike
Adults $145 · Kids $95
San Pedrillo Station. Tapirs, monkeys & even pumas can be spotted. Departs 6:30 AM. Guide & lunch included. Note: Please bring a reusable water bottle — disposable bottles are not allowed.
View Details →
🏄 Surf Classes
$85 / person
~2 hours · Certified instructors. Board, snack, water & chair included.
💦 Nauyaca Waterfalls
From $10–$32
Just 35 minutes away, one of Costa Rica's most breathtaking waterfalls. The Barucito River flows through lush jungle into powerful cascading falls. 11 km hike $10 · or 20 min 4x4 $32 · Mon–Sat · 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM · Last entrance: 1:00 PM
🌊 Uvita Waterfall
4.5 km
Beautiful swimming hole in the rainforest. Open all year round.
🏞️ El Pavon Waterfall
Free · 22 km
Peaceful rainforest waterfall. Worth the drive.
🚣 Kayaking
Ask at reception
Ocean & river options. Caves, snorkeling & mangroves. All gear included.
🪂 Zipline
From $80
Santuario Zipline. Lunch & guides included.
🏍️ ATV / UTV
From $120
Daily 8:00 AM–5:00 PM. Off-road trails through the jungle.
🤿 Scuba – Isla del Caño
$250
No certification needed. Explore the Pacific marine reserve.
🤿 Scuba – Marino Ballena
$165
No certification needed. Dive inside the National Park.
🌿 Mangroves Tour
Min. 4 people
Sierpe River. Macaws, monkeys & crocodiles in their natural habitat.
🐴 Horse Ride
Min. 2 people
~3 hours through forest, beach, river or waterfall trails.
Aura Restaurant
Gastronome's Retreat
Aura Restaurant
10% off food with your room key.

Show your room key at the restaurant to enjoy your discount. Valid on food items during lunch and dinner.

Hours7:00 AM – 9:00 PM
Breakfast7:00 – 9:00 AM · $11 USD
Happy Hour3:00 – 5:00 PM · Enjoy our 1+1 cocktails
Includes 1 breakfast option + 1 beverage per person · One service only (no refill)
Mediterráneo
Bread, jelly jam, eggs, cucumber, tomato, cream cheese and fresh fruits
Costa Rican Típico
Rice & beans, eggs, sour cream, plantain and pico de gallo
Omelette
Prepared with eggs, cheese and vegetables. Served with a slice of bread
Pancakes
Served with fresh fruits and maple syrup
☕ Beverages included: Juice of the Day · Coffee · Tea

Note: Guests who need to leave earlier can request a breakfast-to-go — just ask at reception the night before.

Local Beaches
Coastal Escapes
Nearby Beaches

Pristine Pacific coastline, minutes from your door.

🐋
Playa Uvita & The Whale Tail
300 m · 5 min walking
Marino Ballena National Park. Entry fee: Residents Adults ₡1,130 · Non-residents $6.78 USD. Iconic whale tail sandbar — swim, snorkel & spot wildlife.
🏖️
Playa Colonia (Chaman)
2 km · 5 min drive
Calm, less crowded. Great for swimming and relaxing.
🌅
Playa Hermosa
10 km · 15 min drive
Beautiful sunsets and surf. One of the most scenic beaches in the zone. Free entrance.
🏝️
Playa Ventanas
12 km · 20 min drive
Stunning wild beach with sea caves. Magical at low tide.

Secret Spots
INSIDER TIPS
Yuli's Secret Spots
🎋
The Bamboo Forest
A cathedral of bamboo. Coolest temperature in Uvita.
Go through the back gate of the park and turn left at the giant Guanacaste tree. 📍 Open in Google Maps
Playa Hermosa
A natural rock seat perfectly positioned for sunset.
Walk 15 mins North from the main entrance until you see the Swing Tree. 📍 Open in Google Maps
🕳️
Playa Arco
A secret beach only accessible at low tide through a cave.
Only accessible at low tide — walk through the cave at the south end of Playa Uvita. Check tide times at reception before you go. 📍 Open in Google Maps
💧
El Pavón Waterfall
Famous for the giant stone wedged at the top of the falls.
15 minutes south of Uvita. Free entry. Look for the giant rock wedged dramatically at the top — one of the most unique waterfalls in the zone. 📍 Open in Google Maps
Poza Azul
A natural turquoise pool with a waterfall and rope swing — tucked in the jungle, minutes from the coast. No signs, no entrance fee. Where locals go on Sunday afternoons.
Drive 5 min north to Dominicalito. Turn right at the soccer field, cross the small bridge, go up the hill 200m. Park on the left — trail is on the right. 💡 Yuli's Tip: Check water depth before the rope swing! Don't leave valuables in your car — parking is unattended. 📍 Open in Google Maps
